source_policy.base_items: Use corpus_data/items.json from pinned PathOfBuilding source for base_id/base_name and implicits.
source_policy.explicit_affixes: Use this PoEDB ModsView-derived MVP snapshot for normal rare explicit affix tier/range lookup.
source_policy.lane_rule: Early Game proof items allow only T3 or worse explicit affixes unless operator changes lane.
